hard_gates.name: real_crypto_provider
hard_gates.reason: The v0.6 M1 artifact profile declares RealCryptoProvider = 0.

hard_gates.name: fixture_profile_private_open_reproduction
hard_gates.reason: The independent verifier reproduces fixture-profile private Open outcomes without importing the fixture implementation.

hard_gates.name: provider_backed_v6_kem_key_schedule_evidence
hard_gates.reason: The Rust v6 lane verifies deterministic ML-KEM-1024 and DHKEM(P-384,HKDF-SHA384) decapsulation agreement and derives the v6 key schedule for the schema vector.

hard_gates.name: provider_backed_v6_private_roundtrip_evidence
hard_gates.reason: The Rust v6 lane verifies typed PrivatePayload_v6 CBOR, AEAD seal/open with AD=T0, artifact commitment checking, and public-precheck rejection before private work.

hard_gates.name: provider_backed_reference_seal_open
hard_gates.reason: The Rust v6 lane has provider-backed reference Seal/Open evidence for the C1 schema vector behind explicit non-production external public precheck evidence.

hard_gates.name: provider_backed_vector_agreement
hard_gates.reason: The repo verifies agreement across provider-backed KEM/key-schedule, private-roundtrip, reference Seal/Open, and reference negative-corpus vectors for artifact identity and non-production public-boundary claims.

hard_gates.name: daylight_v6_kat_reproduction_bundle
hard_gates.reason: The repo pins a provider-backed v6 KAT/reproduction bundle for the current vector artifacts, vector-agreement evidence, and local reproduction commands.

hard_gates.name: provider_backed_reference_negative_corpus
hard_gates.reason: The Rust v6 lane has a checked 12-case provider-backed reference negative corpus for external public-precheck denials, production-disallowed denial, and private-path mutation failures.

hard_gates.name: byte_schema_freeze_evidence
hard_gates.reason: The repo checks Daylight v6 schema surface names, transcript labels, KDF labels, rejection stages, schema vector hooks, and reference negative-corpus hooks against the Rust v6 lane and reference docs.

hard_gates.name: integrated_public_authority
hard_gates.reason: The v6 reference Seal/Open lane uses externally supplied non-production public precheck evidence; certificate, revocation, log, install, witness, publish, and trust authority are not integrated.

hard_gates.name: partial_fail_closed_formal_model
hard_gates.reason: The repo tracks a checked partial model for Open=bottom ordering and the PublicPreOK private-operation barrier.

hard_gates.name: m4_symbolic_model
hard_gates.reason: The repo checks an expanded M4 symbolic model for confidentiality assumptions, authorization requirements, downgrade requirements, and fail-closed release behavior over the current 20-predicate Open model.

hard_gates.name: m4_z3_proof
hard_gates.reason: The repo runs Z3 over 38 negated M4 predicate obligations and requires every query to return unsat.

hard_gates.name: daylight_1000_preflight
hard_gates.reason: The repo checks a fail-closed Daylight 1000 preflight that refuses a 1000 checkpoint until integrated public authority, external reviews, and signed non-fixture production authority evidence exist.

hard_gates.name: daylight_1000_claim_gate
hard_gates.reason: The repo checks a composed Daylight 1000 claim gate that exits nonzero until scorecard, external review set, and integrated authority evidence all prove the checkpoint.

hard_gates.name: daylight_1000_checkpoint_writer
hard_gates.reason: The repo checks a guarded Daylight 1000 checkpoint writer that refuses to write a checkpoint artifact unless the composed claim gate is ready.

hard_gates.name: daylight_authority_verifier
hard_gates.reason: The repo verifies signed non-fixture Daylight authority candidates and fails integrated public authority until publish/trust authority support and digest-bound predicate proof integrations exist.

hard_gates.name: formal_model
hard_gates.reason: The current M4 predicate model is covered by a Z3-backed SMT proof; this does not replace external review or cryptographic primitive review.

hard_gates.name: external_review_packet
hard_gates.reason: The repo tracks a current review packet for the 975/1000 evidence set, but no independent external review artifacts are tracked.

hard_gates.name: external_review_verifier
hard_gates.reason: The repo verifies root-key-bound signed Daylight external-review evidence and requires exactly two independent signed reviews before external review credit can be claimed.

hard_gates.name: external_review
hard_gates.reason: No external reviews are tracked.

hard_gates.name: production_authority
hard_gates.reason: No production authority, publish authority, trust authority, or runtime containment gate exists for Daylight.
